description: Triggered when the user wants to plan what content to create, define content pillars, build topic clusters, or prioritize blog topics based on customer research and SEO data.
should_trigger: Help me build a content strategy for our B2B SaaS blog
What topics should we write about for our project management tool?
Create a content pillar structure with topic clusters for our marketing site
I have keyword data from Ahrefs — help me prioritize what to write
We want to do thought leadership content — how should we approach it?
What content gaps exist that our competitors haven't covered?
Help me plan a content calendar for Q2 based on buyer journey stages
should_not_trigger: Write a blog post about how to use our project management tool
Create the copy for our features page
Fix the SEO metadata on my existing blog posts
Audit my website for technical SEO issues
